creator: dan@sunsaturn.com
text:
When selecting maildir config option in /usr/ports/mail/alpine, the following issue happens with maildir.patch.gz:


===>  License APACHE20 accepted by the user
===>  Found saved configuration for alpine-2.11_1
===>   alpine-2.11_1 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> maildir.patch.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/alpine-2.11.
=> Attempting to fetch http://patches.freeiz.com/alpine/patches/alpine-2.11/maildir.patch.gz
fetch: http://patches.freeiz.com/alpine/patches/alpine-2.11/maildir.patch.gz: size mismatch: expected 33160, actual 33737
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/alpine-2.11/maildir.patch.gz
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/alpine-2.11/maildir.patch.gz: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/alpine-2.11 and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/mail/alpine
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/mail/alpine
